description: Plan your next adventure with ease using the Travel Insights MCP. Instantly access country facts, including capital cities, populations, currencies, and languages, all while on the go! Check the current weather conditions for any city around the globe to ensure your travel plans are perfect. Need to manage your budget? Easily convert currencies with live rates to make informed spending decisions. This MCP is perfect for travelers, travel agents, and anyone seeking global knowledge without the hassle of authentication.
